title: How to bypass frustrating AI customer service chatbots and quickly reach a real human representative
summary: Learn how to bypass frustrating AI customer service chatbots and reach a human by using specific trigger words and calling during business hours.
author: Scripps News Group

title: Claude for Finance Teams: Investment Banking, DCF Models, Reconciliation & Variance Analysis
summary: A practical guide to using Claude for investment banking materials, comparable company analysis, DCF models, month-end reconciliation, and variance commentary, with screenshots, setup steps, and honest caveats.
author: Vinit Mehta

title: Detecting Sliver C2: When Advanced Beaconing Tries to Hide in Plain Sight by Lucie Cardiet
summary: Detect how Sliver C2 evades traditional beacon detection and how behavioral AI identifies command-and-control activity hidden in encrypted traffic.
